landing.heroBadge: The Arab learning platform with AI supervision
landing.heroSubtitle: Programming, math, physics and engineering — with an AI mentor that follows every step, corrects your mistakes the moment they happen, and explains why in the way you specifically understand.
landing.howSubtitle: Three steps between you and real, proven learning
landing.how1Desc: Carefully structured tracks in programming, math, physics and engineering — built to global university standards, in Arabic.
landing.how2Desc: In every lesson, the mentor is beside you: watching your solutions, pinpointing mistakes precisely, and explaining where you went wrong and why — before errors take root.
landing.how3Desc: No attendance certificates — mastery certificates. Awarded only after passing real assessments that prove understanding, so they carry actual weight with universities and employers.
landing.catalogTitle: Courses built to a global standard
landing.catalogSubtitle: Deeply built curricula, not scattered videos
landing.testimonialsSubtitle: From Baghdad to Riyadh to Cairo
landing.pricingTitle: Invest in your most valuable asset: your mind
landing.pricingSubtitle: Start free, upgrade when you're ready
landing.planFreeDesc: To experience the Miyar way of learning
landing.planBasicDesc: For the serious student on one track
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of Arab students who chose supervised, real learning
